title: Sugt’stun Immersion Camp in Port Graham [+]
summary: Ten campers at the June language immersion camp gave a resounding “YES! I will return to camp next year.” Sugt’sturllinaq Nupuglluta: We Only Speak Sugt’stun, was developed by the Chugachmiut […] The post Sugt’stun Immersion Camp in Port Graham [+] first appeared on Chugachmiut .
